message:
fix: Add missing tag_name field to UpdateInfo and pass to run_self_update

- UpdateInfo struct required tag_name field but construction was missing it
- run_self_update now requires version parameter; TUI call site updated
- Use CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR in semantic_integration.rs for robust path resolution
- Minor doc comment improvement in model_download.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
